project.name: TEST A — Lump sum / client (must not show line items)

scope_paragraphs: Furnish and install rough carpentry and sheathing per plans dated 01/01/2026, Division 06 scope only.
Excludes MEP, fire sprinkler, and finishes unless noted on drawing SK-0.
Field verify all dimensions prior to fabrication; notify GC of discrepancies within one business day.

line_items.label: INTERNAL TRAP — Framing labor burden detail

assumptions: NJ sales tax treatment per tax note; valid exemption certificates required before invoicing exempt work.
Schedule assumes clear site access Monday–Friday; overtime is extra unless pre-approved in writing.

internal_notes: This note must NOT appear on scenario A PDF (client lump-sum mode).
